overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a character in wizard robes exploring a foggy coastal cliffside dotted with ancient stone ruins and massive skeletal remains. The character descends stone stairs along the cliff face, passes wooden warning signs, traverses a ruined encampment with makeshift shelters, and enters a narrow canyon passage with shallow water.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal cliff top with ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking across grassy cliff top toward stone stairs descending the cliff face

entered.detail: uneven grassy ground at cliff edge with patches of dirt
choppy grey ocean visible through fog below the cliff
clusters of yellow flowering shrubs along the path
weathered stone steps beginning the descent down the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a foggy grassy cliff top with yellow flowering bushes, approaching a stone staircase that descends toward the ocean visible through the mist.

events.description: wooden warning sign with skull and crossbones comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: descending steep stone stairs carved into the cliffside with ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: weathered stone steps with moss and rope fence posts along the edge
wooden post with red skull and crossbones warning sign
steep rock face rising beside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow stone staircase carved into the cliff, with the ocean becoming more prominent to the right. A wooden warning sign with a skull symbol appears on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with giant skeletal remains

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and passes the warning signpost
giant skeletal ribcage structure becomes prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow coastal dirt path passing warning signs and approaching massive skeletal remains

entered.detail: massive ribcage and bones of a giant creature partially buried in the cliff
narrow dirt trail along the cliff edge with wooden posts
tattered fabric tent structure with wooden poles

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the character walks along a coastal dirt path past the warning sign. The massive skeletal remains of a giant creature dominate the right side of the path, while a makeshift tent appears in the distance on the left.

events.description: passing makeshift tent shelter on the left side of the path
walking through large natural stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking through ruined camp area with scattered debris toward a large stone archway

entered.detail: large natural rock archway forming a tunnel through the cliff
wooden planks, barrels, and rubble scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a makeshift shelter through a ruined area littered with wooden debris and stone pillars. The path leads toward and through a massive stone archway that tunnels through the rock face.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow coastal canyon with shallow water

events.description: exiting archway into narrow canyon passage with water on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along wet canyon floor with shallow water lapping at the right side

entered.detail: tall rock walls rising on both sides of the narrow passage
calm shallow water covering the sandy ground on the right side
large curved bones protruding from the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the character enters a narrow canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. Shallow water covers the sandy ground to the right, and large bone fragments are embedded in the canyon walls ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty cliff top down into a narrow, bone-strewn canyon. It begins with the character walking across foggy grass and yellow flowering bushes toward a stone staircase that descends toward the ocean. As the character moves down the narrow stairs, the mist thins to reveal the sea and a wooden warning sign marked with a skull, leading the path onto a coastal dirt trail. The scene then expands past the massive skeletal remains of a giant creature and a makeshift tent, moving through a ruined area of wooden debris and stone pillars before passing under a massive stone archway. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel into a narrow canyon with steep rock walls, where shallow water covers the sandy ground and large bone fragments are embedded in the cliffs ahead.
